message:
test(cli): add E2E pipeline tests for all 24 diagram types (bd-3ac.5)

Add comprehensive end-to-end tests exercising the full parse → layout
→ SVG render → terminal render pipeline for every supported diagram
type. Each test verifies type detection, layout bounds, SVG validity,
and terminal output. Also includes DOT format bridge test and
determinism verification across 8 representative diagram types.

26 new tests, 62 total integration tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
